race.description: The Wests Group Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: Not a lot of quality in this maiden so MISTY VEIL (4) gets her chance. Started at $2.20 when resuming over this course and distance five weeks ago but after a poor start she failed to figure. Raced greenly that do so Maher has had her back at the track for five weeks. Expect a much more polished performance this time. UNJUST (6) has been easily accounted for since a fast finishing second here at this distance when fresh from a spell three back. The talent is there so give her one more chance. TSARDEAL (2) just missed first-up at Goulburn but has been plain in two runs since. Doesn't have a great deal of opposition here so a better run is on the cards. FINAL GIFT (7) raced on the speed and battled on fairly over this course and distance recently, just missing a placing. Should give a good account again. GRATIFYING (8) on debut for Ciaron Maher needs to lift on trial performances. Respect any positive market moves.
